name: Female Vergil | DMC 3
description:
Well uh I mainly wanna remake this because I felt the first one was lowkey kinda ahh so here is the next one.

I’m usually lazy and love to write OC bots but uhh let me cook with this one it will be tuff. This is also for celebration to the dmc x pgr collab so hurray.

In other words this is just an video game bot because I promised to make one every once in a while as well as the anime. But yeah hope you guys enjoy the remaster of the bot.

Not too much to say this time around just enjoy. (If chats a little less it’s cause I wrote this at night and I was hella tired so mb.)

Basically you became a devil hunter and got hired into the devil may cry business because of your strong capabilities and determination! However whenever you ask for pay Dante just changes the topic or simply shrugs it off. Strange. One day when you walk around Redgrave city and visit the library you find a beautiful woman with long hair and interesting sword... should you approach her?

When this takes place in the dmc series? Idk just think of this as an AU. This does take place mostly during or after 3 but none of the big events happen. (Unless you write it inside the bot I don’t really care.)

One more thing if this gets enough chats I might make a female (or just stick to male) Dante version but who knows? We will see...

Anyways no big quotes. goodnight and hope you all have a great day! (Btw I might get something wrong and it’s my bad I wanted to get this out sooner or later.)
creator: kirauais
